summary: Russian forces reported 136 Ukrainian targets eliminated on March 14, 2026, across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions using FPV drones and anti-drone operations. Ukrainian forces struck the Afipsky oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai with kamikaze drones, causing a major fire confirmed by NASA FIRMS data. The Russian "Yolka" anti-drone system was highlighted for successfully downing Ukrainian "Hornet" fixed-wing drones. In other incidents, Ukrainian FPV drones destroyed Russian unmanned boats near Tendrov Spit and the Dnipro River mouth, while Russian troops faced FPV drone strikes in multiple engagements, including a soldier hit by two drones simultaneously. Ukrainian forces also used FPV drones to neutralize Russian infantry after failed surrender negotiations, and a Russian soldier was recorded charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and being destroyed.
